section1.title: 1. General Information
section1.p1: TyPlace is an online platform (marketplace) designed to facilitate transactions between users for the sale and purchase of digital goods and services.
section1.p2: The platform provides technical infrastructure for listing offers, user communication, and secure transaction tools (escrow).

section2.title: 2. Platform Status
section2.p1: TyPlace acts as an information intermediary and is not a seller of digital goods or services. Transactions are concluded directly between users.
section2.p2: The platform operator does not acquire ownership of the transaction item and is not a party to the sale contract.

section3.title: 3. Legal Information
section3.l2: Registration form: Sole Proprietor / LLC / other

section4.title: 4. Control and Security
section4.p1: The platform applies measures to prevent fraud, including:

section5.title: 5. International Nature
section5.p1: The platform may be used by users from different countries. Users are responsible for complying with the laws of their jurisdiction.
